channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why you should update your old dating app profile photos ASAP
item.description: Daters: It might be time to spring clean your dating app profile. More than 50% of young Americans have gone on a date with someone who looked different from their profile photos, according to a new survey from dating app Hily.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Meta faces historic antitrust trial that could force it to break off Instagram, WhatsApp
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took the stand on Monday in a historic antitrust trial that could force the tech giant to break off Instagram and WhatsApp, startups it bought more than a decade ago that have since grown into social media powerhouses.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nvidia Announces AI Supercomputer Production in US
item.description: Nvidia to produce AI supercomputers in Arizona and Texas, creating hundreds of thousands of jobs and driving trillions in economic security over the coming decades.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How people secured their secrets before encyption
item.description: Centuries before encrypted texts and secure video conferencing, people relied on physical engineering to keep their written messages sturdy, sealed, and secure against eavesdroppers.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia says it will build up to $500 billion of AI gear in US
item.description: Electronics players around the world, including chipmakers, are reeling from shifting new tariff policies from the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Can’t securely login to your PC using facial recognition anymore? New Windows 11 update patch is likely to blame – if you can install the update at all
item.description: Windows 11’s new update is breaking facial recognition logins with Windows Hello, and also simply failing to install.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple TV+ confirms it's game over for Mythic Quest as the hit show is canceled after 4 seasons
item.description: Mythic Quest will end after season 4, with one final episode airing next week to give one of the best Apple TV+ shows a good send off.
item.dc:creator: lucy.buglass@futurenet.com (Lucy Buglass), TechRadar

item.title: Sony hikes PlayStation 5 console prices for Europe, UK and Australia citing economic turmoil
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Sony said it will raise prices starting Monday for some PlayStation 5 video game consoles in Europe, Australia and New Zealand, citing global economic turmoil.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Leaked Avengers: Doomsday images seemingly tease meeting between rival X-Men characters – and a Marvel hero who wasn't part of the original cast reveal
item.description: The first set leaks from Avengers 5 have been posted online and they reveal some interesting things about the MCU film.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Historic domes of Hagia Sophia are renovated to protect the landmark from earthquakes
item.description: Turkey has begun a new phase in sweeping restorations of the nearly 1,500-year-old Hagia Sophia in Istanbul, focusing on preserving the monument’s historic domes from the threat of earthquakes.
item.dc:creator: Robert Badendieck And Mehmet Guzel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: El Camino Health implements AI, robots in hospitals to improve efficiency
item.description: Artificial intelligence is now helping doctors and nurses at El Camino Health hospitals monitor patient vital signs, detect illnesses in X-rays and draft doctor's notes and responses for patients.
item.dc:creator: Nollyanne Delacruz, The Mercury News

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: More and faster: New proposals changing Python from within
item.description: Top picks for Python readers on InfoWorld Making Python faster won’t be easy, but it’ll be worth it Python’s malleability and dynamism make it powerful, but also very hard to speed up. Here’s a look at some of the ways developers are working to make Python faster from within.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How thieves use new credit card numbers before you receive them
item.description: The CyberGuy provides tips to protect yourself from criminals who use various methods to make unauthorized transactions using your account information.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One Tech Tip: Locking down your device when crossing borders
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Planning an international trip? Travelers should prepare for the possibility of extra scrutiny of their phones when crossing borders, especially when entering the United States. The Canadian government warned travelers in a recent travel advisory that U.S.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Drones are the future of cybercrime
item.description: The Ukrainian military is teaching the world how to creatively use drones for battlefield offense and defense. Ukraine has built a vast arsenal of drones customized for precision strikes, reconnaissance, and kamikaze missions. But this innovation also extends to cybersecurity offense and defense.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cisco, Google Cloud offer enterprises new way to connect SD-WANs
item.description: Cisco and Google Cloud have expanded their partnership to integrate Cisco’s SD-WAN with the cloud provider’s fully managed Cloud WAN service.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke Introduces AI Mandate: Employees Must Prove Need for New Hires
item.description: Shopify's CEO, Tobi Lutke, has introduced a new mandate requiring employees to prove the need for new hires before adding staff. The move aims to utilize artificial intelligence (AI) to augment team capabilities and streamline business processes.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, WGN 9

item.title: Tailscale secures $160 million for its WireGuard-based VPN development
item.description: Virtual private network (VPN) technology has been a cornerstone of the networking landscape for decades, beginning first with the IPsec protocol then getting a bit easier with SSL-VPN technology. But little has changed with the technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: The dangers of oversharing with AI tools
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 200 million social media records leaked in major X data breach
item.description: X hit with massive data breach with 200 million records leaked, including emails. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers seven tips to help protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google adds open source framework for building agents to Vertex AI
item.description: Google is adding a new open source framework for building agents to its AI and machine learning platform Vertex AI, along with other updates to help deploy and maintain these agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Broadcom favors stock buyback over investing in innovation
item.description: Broadcom plans to spend its cash pile on buying back as much as $10 billion worth of its common stock, dampening IT department hopes that it might invest in innovation or make its products more affordable.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft workers say they've been fired after 50th anniversary protest over Israel contract
item.description: Microsoft has fired two employees who interrupted the company's 50th anniversary celebration to protest its work supplying artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military, according to a group representing the workers.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
